data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a trough of low pressure, there will still be showers and thunderstorms over the coast of Guangdong this morning. With the trough of low pressure departing, showers will ease off gradually over the region midweek this week. Under the influence of an easterly airstream, the weather will be brighter over the coast of Guangdong in the middle and latter parts of this week, but there will still be a few showers. An active southerly airstream and upper-air disturbances are expected to affect the coast of southern China early to midweek next week, the weather will be unsettled again over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260609","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"West force 4, occasionally force 5 at first, becoming north force 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers. Isolated thunderstorms at first.
